ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student's parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the teacher is employed at */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "subject_taught" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the teacher */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who created the assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, exam, project) */,
  "assessment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments_taken" (
  "assessment_taken_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment taken */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment taken */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the assessment was taken */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken by the student to complete the assessment in minutes */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Attempt number of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_taken_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_taken_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_taken_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer to the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, true/false, descriptive) */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks allocated to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the answer */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer provided */,
  "answer_status" TEXT /* Status of the answer (e.g., correct, incorrect, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_answers_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES assessment_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the score */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which the score was achieved */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "score_status" TEXT /* Status of the score (e.g., finalized, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scores_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the ranking */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which the ranking was achieved */,
  "ranking" TEXT /* Ranking achieved by the student (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., overall, subject-wise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "t_scores" (
  "t_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each T-score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the T-score */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which the T-score was achieved */,
  "t_score" REAL /* T-score achieved by the student */,
  "t_score_status" TEXT /* Status of the T-score (e.g., finalized, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("t_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_t_scores_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_t_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose progress is being tracked */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which progress is being tracked */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student at the time of tracking */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the progress was tracked */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the progress (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school whose performance is being tracked */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which performance is being tracked */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score achieved by students in the school */,
  "performance_status" TEXT /* Status of the performance (e.g., excellent, good, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the grade */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which the grade was achieved */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose attendance is being tracked */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which attendance is being tracked */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who provided the feedback */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which feedback was provided */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)
